channel.title: SSpolitics
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from SSpolitics, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Ro Khanna urges King Charles to address Epstein victims
item.description: Rep. Khanna wants the king to acknowledge victims when speaking to Congress.

item.title: Fourth attempt on Trump's life raises questions on 'Trump Derangement Syndrome'
item.description: Four assassination attempts in two years, some blame left-wing demonization.

item.title: WHCA dinner shooting suspect's manifesto points to anti-Trump motive
item.description: Suspect wrote manifesto ranting against Trump and his policies.

item.title: King Charles heads to Washington to repair U.S.-U.K. relations
item.description: Trump hosts British king as tensions remain high on multiple fronts.
